raw_title: Book Review: ‘American Men,’ by Jordan Ritter Conn; ‘Who Needs Friends,’ by Andrew McCarthy
book_title: ‘American Men,’ by Jordan Ritter Conn; ‘Who Needs Friends,’ by Andrew McCarthy
description: “American Men,” by Jordan Ritter Conn, and “Who Needs Friends,” by Andrew McCarthy, report from the front lines of the epidemic of male loneliness.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘A Treacherous Secret Agent,’ by Marjorie Garber
book_title: ‘A Treacherous Secret Agent,’ by Marjorie Garber
description: In a new book, the Harvard scholar Marjorie Garber suggests how Americans targeted during the Red Scare used literature to confound their interrogators.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘Open Space,’ by David Ariosto
description: “Open Space,” by David Ariosto, suggests there are few limits on human ingenuity that could prevent us from colonizing the cosmos.
